entries.title: Prime Numbers
entries.content: Integer greater than 1 divisible only by 1 and itself. 2 is the only even prime. Fundamental to cryptography.

entries.title: Fibonacci Sequence
entries.content: Each term is sum of previous two: 0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13… Appears in nature and art (golden ratio limit).

entries.title: Greatest Common Divisor (GCD)
entries.content: Largest integer dividing two numbers evenly. Euclidean algorithm finds GCD efficiently.

entries.title: Least Common Multiple (LCM)
entries.content: Smallest number divisible by both given numbers. LCM × GCD = product of the numbers.

entries.title: Percentage Change
entries.content: Percent change = ((new − old) / old) × 100%. Used in finance, science, and statistics.
